subject: Deoxys in Normal Forme, a slender alien-like creature with a central body crystal and symmetric tentacle limbs, hovering amid aurora light
description: Deoxys hovers in a dynamic upright pose against a swirling backdrop of purple and blue energy suggesting aurora or deep space. Its body is bilaterally symmetric: a central torso with a glowing red-orange crystal core, two long sinuous tentacle-like arms extending outward, and two smaller lower limbs. The limbs are rendered in deep blue-purple tones. The posture is open and confrontational, suggesting readiness. The holofoil treatment adds shimmer to the energy field surrounding the figure. This is the Normal Forme — balanced proportions, no exaggerated attack limbs or armored bulk.
foreground: Deoxys Normal Forme hovering with tentacle limbs spread
background: swirling purple-blue aurora and space energy
